# CypAI
> AI-powered customer service, lead generation, and booking automation for businesses in Cyprus and the MENA region.

## Overview
CypAI (https://www.cypai.app) is a specialized AI platform for high-ticket lead recovery in Northern Cyprus medical tourism, real estate, residency, and other multilingual service businesses. It helps teams respond faster, qualify better, and recover missed revenue through automation.

## Core Capabilities
- 24/7 AI chatbot for customer inquiries, pricing, and FAQs
- WhatsApp integration for automated business messaging
- Multilingual support in English, Turkish, Arabic, Russian, and Greek
- Lead management (CRM) for capturing and tracking prospects
- Booking automation for appointments and reservations
- Dashboard analytics for conversations and conversion trends

## Target Industries
- Medical Tourism: IVF, dental, aesthetics, and patient intake
- Real Estate and Residency: investor qualification and relocation enquiries
- Hospitality: hotels and guesthouses
- Local Services: clinics, restaurants, gyms, and student housing

## Technical Access
- Main URL: https://www.cypai.app
- Platform Type: Web-based SoftwareApplication
- Setup Time: ~15 minutes via script/widget integration
- Service Reach: Cyprus and MENA, globally accessible

## Contact & Support
- Email: cypai.app@cypai.app
- WhatsApp Support: +90 533 842 5559
- Location: Northern Cyprus (Kyrenia, Nicosia, Famagusta)
